questions.question: Production deployment, NVMe SSD. Какой PredefinedOptions profile использовать?

options.text: FLASH_SSD_OPTIMIZED — optimized для SSD: smaller SST (parallel compaction), more background jobs, LZ4 compression, max_open_files=-1

questions.explanation: FLASH_SSD_OPTIMIZED specifically tuned для NVMe SSD: (1) target_file_size_base 64MB — smaller SST позволяют parallel compaction; (2) max_background_jobs 4 — больше parallelism для SSD throughput; (3) LZ4 compression — faster чем Snappy для SSD I/O speeds; (4) max_open_files -1 — SSD random access cheap, OK держать все open. DEFAULT — conservative для unknown hardware, не optimized. SPINNING profiles — для HDD: bigger SST (256MB) для уменьшения seeks, snappy compression. 95% of production NVMe deployments — FLASH_SSD_OPTIMIZED.

questions.question: Нужен custom tweak (max_background_jobs=8). Какой подход безопаснее?

options.text: Написать custom RocksDBOptionsFactory, override createDBOptions с new DBOptions().setMaxBackgroundJobs(8)
Использовать flink-conf property: state.backend.rocksdb.thread.num: 8. Это preserves PredefinedOptions, WriteBufferManager и Block Cache. НЕ риск OOM

questions.explanation: flink-conf property — safe approach. state.backend.rocksdb.thread.num: 8 устанавливает background jobs preserving все остальное (PredefinedOptions, WriteBufferManager, Block Cache injection). Custom factory (option a) — dangerous: new DBOptions() без super.createDBOptions() = WBM лост = OOM через часы. Если нужен custom factory — ALWAYS extend DefaultConfigurableOptionsFactory и call super first. Best practice: 95% of customizations через flink-conf properties — custom factory only для extreme cases с specific RocksDB internals access (rare).

questions.question: Что PredefinedOptions НЕ устанавливают?

options.text: Memory management (WriteBufferManager, Block Cache injection). Это separate config: taskmanager.memory.managed.fraction, state.backend.rocksdb.memory.managed, write-buffer-ratio. PredefinedOptions говорит 'как организовать', Memory management говорит 'сколько памяти'

questions.explanation: PredefinedOptions устанавливают per-CF settings (writebuffer size, target_file_size_base), compaction options, compression per level, bloom filter settings. НО не memory budget itself. Memory management через separate config namespace: taskmanager.memory.managed.fraction (общий managed budget), state.backend.rocksdb.memory.managed: true (enables shared resources), write-buffer-ratio (WBM share), high-prio-pool-ratio (BC). Это separation позволяет deploy PredefinedOptions consistently across different hardware sizes — memory adjusts через fractions, не через profile change.
questions.studyHint: Повторите урок — Что PredefinedOptions НЕ устанавливают

questions.question: flink-conf overrides specific RocksDB options и могут coexist с PredefinedOptions — конкретные keys override profile defaults.
questions.explanation: True. Inheritance + customization: PredefinedOptions provides baseline, flink-conf state.backend.rocksdb.* keys override specific settings. Example: predefined-options: FLASH_SSD_OPTIMIZED (sets MemTable size 64MB) + state.backend.rocksdb.writebuffer.size: 256mb (overrides к 256MB). Final config: 256MB MemTable plus все другие FLASH_SSD settings. Это correct inheritance behavior. Allow granular tuning without breaking profile or losing memory management. Best practice: start с profile, measure, override только specific bottlenecks. Profile updates с Flink upgrades — your overrides preserved.
